mapper.select: SELECT o.id, IFNULL(e.name, '--') AS elderName, IFNULL(e.bed_number, '--') AS bedNumber, o.project_name AS projectName, o.item_type AS itemType, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT n.name SEPARATOR ', ') AS nurseName, o.applicant_name AS applicantName, o.expected_service_time AS expectedServiceTime, o.create_time AS createTime, o.order_no AS orderNo, MAX(oe.execute_status) AS executeStatus, IFNULL(MAX(oe.executor_name), '--') AS executorName, IFNULL(MAX(DATE_FORMAT(oe.execute_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')), '--') AS executeTime, IFNULL(MAX(oe.execute_image), '') AS executeImage, IFNULL(MAX(oe.execute_record), '--') AS executeRecord, IFNULL(MAX(DATE_FORMAT(oe.cancel_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')), '--') AS cancelTime, IFNULL(MAX(oe.cancel_reason), '--') AS cancelReason FROM lc_service_order o LEFT JOIN elder e ON o.elder_id = e.id LEFT JOIN lc_elder_nurse_assign en ON e.id = en.elder_id LEFT JOIN lc_nurse n ON en.nurse_id = n.id LEFT JOIN lc_nursing_task_execution oe ON o.id = oe.order_id WHERE o.id = #{id} GROUP BY o.id
mapper.update: UPDATE lc_nursing_task_execution SET execute_status = '2', cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, cancel_time = #{cancelTime}, executor_name = #{executorName}, executor_id = #{executorId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{id}

UPDATE lc_nursing_task_execution SET execute_status = '1', execute_time = #{executeTime}, execute_image = #{vo.executeImage}, execute_record = #{vo.executeRecord}, executor_name = #{executorName}, executor_id = #{executorId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{id}
UPDATE lc_nursing_task_execution SET execute_status = '3', execute_time = #{executeTime}, executor_name = #{executorName}, executor_id = #{executorId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lc_nursing_task_execution ( order_id, execute_status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, '0', #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )
